title: 第 94 節
en: Ganussoni brahmaaa, xiii, 108. Gappa, recitation, xiii, rog. Garasutta, 150.
Gatukayain manava, xiii, 179, 194. Getavana, 17, 20, 42, 47, 61, 71, 116. Gina, conqueror, 62, 126, 178.
Hymns, xiii, 23, 41, 50, 97, 124, 168, [ékhbinamkala, 107. Inda god, 50, 51, 123, 181. Ivigita, commotion, 138. Isi, sage, 28, 33, 47, 58, 74, 114, 123, Itihasa, xiii, 97, 181.
Kanha= Mara, 58, 70, 174. Kanhabhigatika, of black origin, 102. Kanhasiri isi, 123, 124.
Kappatita, who has overcome time, Kappayana or Kappiya brahmaza= Nigrodhakappa, 58..
